_comment: Edit this file to simulate different users. All fields mirror production Firestore.

personal_information.name: Vinay
personal_information.general_info: office worker, sits for long hours, wants to improve flexibility

personal_summary._long_term: 24 Apr 2026: Interested in starting yoga for back pain relief. Prefers morning sessions.

personal.agent_response:
Vinay ji, I can help with that!

We offer guided yoga sessions daily, focusing on beginner-friendly practices for flexibility and back pain relief.

- Find a quiet space.
- Join sessions on time.
- Follow instructor's guidance.

Ready to join a session?

personal.user_query: tell me the available plans of yoga sessions
personal.agent_response:
Vinay ji, I can help with that!

We offer monthly and quarterly plans for unlimited access to all yoga sessions.

- Choose your plan.
- Complete the payment.
- Start your yoga journey!

Contact us via WhatsApp for any queries.

Which plan are you interested in?
personal.current_chat_summary: User inquired about yoga session plans.

personal.agent_response: Hello Vinay ji! How can I help you today?

Main Team Habuild ke taraf se yoga aur wellness assistant hoon!

Aapki kya madad kar sakta hoon?

Namaste Vinay ji! Main aapki yoga aur wellness mein madad karne ke liye yahan hoon. Meal plan ke liye, aapko ek nutritionist se consult karna chahiye.

Aap yoga ke baare mein kuch poochhna chahenge?
personal.current_chat_summary: User asked for a meal plan, responded that I cannot provide it and suggested consulting a nutritionist.
